name: @breaking-news/worker
description: Breaking News Intelligence Platform - BullMQ Worker Service

scripts.start: (prisma db push --skip-generate 2>&1 || echo 'prisma db push failed - non-fatal'); node dist/index.js
scripts.start:critical: (prisma db push --skip-generate 2>&1 || echo 'db push skipped'); node dist/worker-critical.js
scripts.start:standard: (prisma db push --skip-generate 2>&1 || echo 'db push skipped'); node dist/worker-standard.js
